description: Tristan Frizza discusses Zeta Markets, a decentralized exchange (DEX) that aims to provide derivatives trading on-chain, akin to centralized exchanges (CEX). He shares insights on the evolution of DeFi, the challenges of implementing complex trading systems on blockchain, and the vision behind Zeta's offerings.
topic_summary: Tristan Frizza introduces Zeta Markets and its mission to bring derivatives trading on-chain, highlighting the importance of self-custody and transparency in DeFi. He reflects on the historical context of trading technologies and the challenges faced in developing sophisticated trading platforms in the crypto space. [t=0:24 - t=3:19]
